mnemonics: Make Every Action Yield Sustainable Tomorrow
keyPoints: The European Union implemented the Electrical Goods Directive 2019/1789/EU, which sets new rules for the recycling of electronic waste in the EU.
The International E-Waste Day was observed for the first time on March 18, 2022, raising awareness about the environmental impacts of e-waste.
The Swedish government announced plans to phase out all single-use plastics by 2030, which has significant implications for e-waste management and recycling.
